final:
module top_module(
	 input  RegRA,               
	 input  [31:0] RegData,      
	 input  [31:0] PCplus8,      
	 output  [31:0] raRegData    
	 );assign raRegData = RegRA ? PCplus8 : RegData;  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (RegRA) begin
        raRegData <= RegData;
      end else begin
        raRegData <= PCplus8;
      end;
    end
  end

endmodule
